# Spinner

A loading spinner component used to indicate that content or an action is loading.

## Import

```jsx
import { Spinner } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" \| "xl"` | `"md"` | The size of the spinner. |
| `color` | `string` | - | The color of the spinner. Accepts any CSS color or theme token. |
| `thickness` | `string` | - | The thickness of the spinner border (e.g., `"4px"`). |
| `speed` | `string` | - | The animation speed (e.g., `"0.8s"`). |
| `label` | `string` | `"Loading..."` | Accessible label for the spinner. Set to an empty string to hide. |

## Usage

### Basic Spinner

```jsx
<Spinner />
```

### Spinner Sizes

```jsx
<Spinner size="xs" />
<Spinner size="sm" />
<Spinner size="md" />
<Spinner size="lg" />
<Spinner size="xl" />
```

### Custom Color and Thickness

```jsx
<Spinner color="blue.500" thickness="4px" speed="0.65s" />
```
